allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix profile photo upload: use Supabase Storage and correct column names

- Upload images to Supabase Storage ''avatars'' bucket instead of base64
- Fix column name mismatch: profile_image → profile_image_url, background_image → background_image_url
- Fix data loading to read from correct column names

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Fix schema/code mismatches: align DB columns with frontend expectations

- Recreate tables with text-based columns instead of UUID FKs
- Fix groups insert: emoji → img column name
- Fix table name: proposed_trip_requests → join_requests
- Fix proposed_trips: organizer_id → organizer_handle
- Simplify RLS policies for fresh database
- Add migration SQL file for user to run

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
